content.full_text:
ADVICE FILE INDEX

TELEPHONE ADVICE

FILE SUMMARY  A candidate's spouse who gave more than $5,000 to the campaign would not have to file as a major donor if the contribution came from community funds and it was clearly so indicated on candidate's statement.

CODE/REGULATION SECTION(S)  82013(c), 82015

REQUESTING PARTY  -  FILE NO. TA-82-034

POSITION/CITY/AGENCY  -

STAFF PERSON  Diane Fishburn  DATE OF CALL  Jan. 1982 (Jeanne Pritchard)
